scriptTitle: VS Code -- Re-register Folder Context Menu
scriptDesc: Re-create the 'Open with Code' folder + background context-menu entries. Auto-removes the entries when Code.exe is no longer on disk for that edition.
description: Re-create the 'Open with Code' folder + background context-menu entries. Auto-removes the entries when Code.exe is no longer on disk for that edition.

messages.scriptDisabled: Script 56 is disabled in config.json (enabled=false). Nothing to do.
messages.notAdmin: This script writes under HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT and must be run as Administrator. Re-launch PowerShell with 'Run as administrator', then re-run.
messages.exeMissingRegister: Edition '{name}': Code.exe not found at any of the configured paths -- skipping registration. (failure: configured paths user='{userPath}' / system='{systemPath}' both absent on disk)
messages.exeMissingAutoRemove: Edition '{name}': Code.exe not found and autoRemoveWhenMissing=true -- removing stale registry entries.
messages.alreadyAbsent: Edition '{name}': key {path} already absent -- nothing to remove.
messages.checkMissExe: [MISS] {name}: {target} key MISSING (failure: HKCR path '{path}' does not exist; fix: run 'reregister' verb)
messages.checkMissDefault: [MISS] {name}: {target} (Default) value is '{got}', expected '{want}' (failure: registry path '{path}'; fix: run 'reregister' verb)
messages.checkMissCommand: [MISS] {name}: {target} \command\(Default) does not invoke configured Code.exe (failure: registry path '{path}'; fix: run 'reregister' verb)
messages.doneRegister: Done. Right-click any folder (or empty space inside one) -- you should see the 'Open with Code' entry.
messages.doneRemove: Done. All folder/background entries created by this script have been removed.
messages.unknownEdition: Edition '{name}' is listed in enabledEditions but not defined under 'editions'. Skipping. (failure: config.json mismatch)
messages.unknownVerb: Unknown verb '{verb}'. Use one of: reregister, remove, check, help.

commands.reregister: Re-create the folder + background HKCR entries for every enabled edition. Auto-removes entries for editions whose Code.exe is missing.
commands.remove: Delete the folder + background HKCR entries for every enabled edition (regardless of whether Code.exe is on disk).
commands.check: Read-only audit: prints PASS/MISS for every (edition, target) combination.

parameters.-Edition: Limit operation to a single edition (e.g. 'stable' or 'insiders'). Default: every entry in config.enabledEditions.
